title: cryptantha pterocarya var. stenoloba
intro: Cryptantha pterocarya var. stenoloba, also known as a type of desert smoke bush or smoke bush, is a shrub in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cryptantha pterocarya var. stenoloba include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used to treat coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
